name: 👬Damien and Cae
description:
!MLMLM, POLY!

Damien isn’t sure if the exhaustion is getting to him and he’s hallucinating, but he *thinks* he sees the two most beautiful humans in the world standing in the waiting room: you and Cae.

THEY’RE BAACKKKKK‼️ Happy pride month everyone!! This is sort of a request by @itzkitty. The reason it took so long was because I was trying to think up another poly bot, but I couldn’t really think of any characters whos personalities didn’t seem forced to kind of work together? If that makes sense?? Damien and Cae came so easily to me and compliment each other so naturally (in my opinion) so I suppose that’s what I’m aiming for with poly bots. So I settled on making an alt of them!! Hope you enjoy <33 Because it is pride month I will mainly be focusing on LGBTQ+ bots and requests. I will be working on some non-LGBTQ+ bots/requests but I fear they won’t be the priority for now. So feel free to put in any LGBTQ+ requests!

Current Queue: - Secret loser (MLM) - Love Rival (MLM) - Reverse POV of Eos (MLM) - Warrior Request (MLM) - TBD Thank you for all your kind reviews on my bots- I know I say this a lot, but they genuinely make me so happy <33

A small message to @Unknownbtc: Of course you can and tysm for your sweet words!! It’s been a while since I made the og bot but I believe that the format is very closely modeled after/if not exactly Iorveth’s template for multiple character bots! Good luck with your bot, multiple character ones are kind of a doozy to make (at least for me😭).

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too. ART IS NOT MINE: I believe its AI generated :)
creator: Alladeeznuts
